name: Cepheus Protocol Anthology Season 1
short_description: Experience the outbreak of the Pangu Virus from multiple perspectives across as the brave heroes of the Center for Epidemic Research and Control battle tirelessly to stop the spread of a cataclysmic alien virus that has mutated innocent people into monstrous creatures of unimaginable power
detailed_description:
Inspired by the classic World War Z novel, Cepheus Protocol Anthology is a thrilling journey through the eyes of multiple protagonists facing off against an extraterrestrial virus that can turn humans into the living dead.

The Pangu Virus has invaded San Francisco and puts millions of humans at risk of being transformed into horrific creatures. The Center for Epidemic Research and Control must act quickly to contain the outbreak before it spreads throughout the globe. But as those infected continue to morph into deadly hybrids, the CERC's best efforts seem insufficient.

Cepheus Protocol Anthology is a visual novel based on the video game, Cepheus Protocol. With stunning comic book-style illustrations, fans can explore the origins of the Pangu Virus and get a glimpse of what led up to events seen in the video game.
